items.title: sqlite-utils 4.0rc1 adds migrations and nested transactions
items.summary: sqlite-utils is my combined Python library and CLI tool for working with SQLite databases. It provides an extensive set of higher-level operations on top of Python's default sqlite3 package , including support for complex table transformations , automatic table creation from JSON data and a whole lot more.
